summary: Implemented mentor escalation logic with confidence-based decision framework. Created va_client.py for reverse API communication and escalate.py for decision routing based on localization protocol thresholds.
learnings: va_client.py mirrors zoputer_client.py structure but with reversed direction (zoputer→va instead of va→zoputer)
Confidence thresholds work correctly: ≥0.7 auto, 0.5-0.7 ask va, <0.5 ask human
Always-human decision types override confidence scores for security/audit/compliance decisions
LLM-based confidence assessment considers change type, risk level, precedent, and authority scope
Audit integration ensures all escalations are logged with correlation IDs for cross-instance verification

verification_completed: CLI help output works for both scripts
Always-human override works for security decisions
Scripts are executable with proper permissions

integration_notes.audit_system: All escalations logged with correlation IDs
integration_notes.va_api_bridge: Uses same format as existing zoputer_client.py

details.human_escalation_note: ask-human command is placeholder - full implementation in D3.x streams for pending decisions queue
